reason: Realised return -0.09% below target +5% — loosened entry
Current RSI 26 is too sensitive and generates premature entries; raising to 32 filters out weak signals and reduces stop-loss hits from false breakouts.
Increase RSI threshold to 35 and stop-loss to 3.0% to reduce whipsaws on volatile assets, while reducing position size to 0.35 to improve risk-adjusted returns and meet Sharpe ratio requirement.
